$comment: Authorization configuration for GPG signing server.
$comment2: Phase 1: roles keyed by source IP are not used — 'default' role applies to all requests.
$comment3: Phase 2: add token-named roles here to map pre-shared tokens to key allowlists.

default.description: Phase 1 catch-all role — applied to all requests when AUTH_ENABLED=false. Rate limit keyed by source IP.

operator.description: Authorized operator performing manual signing via sign-file CLI.

therock-dev.description: Phase 2: TheRock dev/PR builds. Token: signing/tokens/therock-dev in Secrets Manager.

therock-nightly.description: Phase 2: TheRock nightly builds. Token: signing/tokens/therock-nightly in Secrets Manager.

therock-release.description: Phase 2: TheRock release builds. Token: signing/tokens/therock-release in Secrets Manager.
